message:
✨ Unified CardAIActions for Diagnose/Repair buttons across all cards (#661) (#667)

- Enhanced CardAIActions with new props: showRepair, repairLabel,
  diagnosePrompt, repairPrompt, onDiagnose, onRepair
- Replaced old-style inline buttons in 6 cards: ConsoleOfflineDetectionCard,
  WorkloadMonitorAlerts, GitHubCIMonitor, LLMdStackMonitor, ActiveAlerts,
  AlertBadge
- Added CardAIActions to 13 cards for non-healthy items: HardwareHealthCard,
  WarningEvents, GPUWorkloads, OperatorStatus, HelmReleaseStatus, PVCStatus,
  TopPods, UpgradeStatus, ProwJobs, ServiceExports, GatewayStatus,
  KustomizationStatus, CRDHealth
- Fixed LLMdStackMonitor bug where both Diagnose and Repair called same handler
- Prediction items use "Prevent" label instead of "Repair"

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
